content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Solve Debugging Errors
content.seo_description: Learn how to master project management to overcome debugging bottlenecks. A professional guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just code; it's a structural failure. By integrating project management workflows with AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform chaotic troubleshooting into a systematic, repeatable process. This approach minimizes downtime, stabilizes your client deliverables, and turns complex bugs into solved tasks in minutes.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal at 2 AM. The client’s deadline is looming, the codebase is a labyrinth of spaghetti logic, and you’re stuck in a loop of 'fix one bug, break two more.' This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of system. When your project management fails, your debugging becomes a guessing game that burns your margin and your reputation.

But what if debugging wasn't a frantic search for needles in haystacks? By treating your codebase like a managed product, you can leverage AI-native tools to audit, isolate, and resolve issues with surgical precision. It’s time to stop 'coding by hope' and start shipping with predictable, bulletproof workflows.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Before fixing, you must map the failure point. Use Antigravity to generate a high-level dependency graph to identify where the state corruption is occurring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure. Identify all circular dependencies and state-management files. Output a JSON map of the module hierarchy.

steps.title: Isolation via Sandbox
steps.description: Create a minimal reproduction script to isolate the bug from the noise of the main application bundle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a sandbox test file that imports only the suspect module. Mock all API calls to verify if the bug is logic-based or integration-based.

steps.title: Systematic Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a blame-trace analysis on the specific functions identified during the audit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a root cause analysis on the identified function. Compare the current implementation against standard design patterns for this specific framework.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Identify the specific line causing the memory leak in the handleRequest function.'

steps.title: Automated Remediation
steps.description: Apply the fix using an AI-generated patch, ensuring all unit tests pass before merging back to the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactored version of the problematic function. Include unit tests that cover the edge case identified in the previous step.

steps.title: Regression Documentation
steps.description: Log the resolution into your project management system to prevent recurring technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the bug, the root cause, and the fix into a professional technical post-mortem report suitable for a client handoff.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a project management ticket summary for this bug resolution.'

pro_tips: Always run your debugger in a clean environment state to prevent 'ghost' variables from polluting your test results.
Use Claude Code's context-window effectively by providing only the relevant file path, not the entire repo, to reduce hallucinations.
Treat your error logs as data; pipe them directly into Antigravity to find patterns instead of reading them manually.
Automate your 'Git Clean' process after every successful bug fix to keep your commit history professional and clear for clients.
Before finalizing a fix, ask the AI to 'critique this code for potential security vulnerabilities' to add extra value to your deliverables.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's dependency structure using the provided CLI tools and establish a 'Known Good' baseline before attempting any major refactors.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start managing it like a professional engineer. By adopting these AI-driven workflows, you'll reclaim your time and deliver higher quality work to your clients every single day. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
